# finer - Financial AI Research Project

finer is a modular, AI-native pipeline for turning non-standard creator content into structured, backtestable investment events.

## File Map
- /src/finer/ : Core logic components
- /src/finer/ingestion/ : Multi-source ingestion (Feishu, Vision, NLM Sync)
- /schemas/ : Pydantic data contracts (Source of Truth)
- /docs/explanations/system-architecture.md : Detailed architecture design
- /docs/how-to/feishu-integration.md : Feishu & NotebookLM setup guide
- /configs/feishu.yaml.example : Template for Feishu/NLM configuration

## Key Concepts
- **TradingAction**: A sequence of structured trading intents (long, short, sell_put, etc.) with trigger conditions.
- **21-Dimensional Matrix**: A comprehensive evaluation framework for financial sentiment and analysis quality.
- **Feishu Integrator**: Automated message poller and attachment downloader.
- **NotebookLM Sync**: Automated uploading of processed news/transcripts to personal knowledge bases.

## Core Tech Stack
- Language: Python 3.11+
- Intelligence: Qwen-VL-Max / GPT-4o via Instructor
- Data: Polars, Pydantic, Data-Juicer
- Tools: lark-cli, nlm-cli

For detailed documentation, visit: https://kelipovanatalja453-bot.github.io/finer/
